description: GICS sector label → SPDR sector ETF ticker. Used by algorithms 11 (EPS Revision Breadth), 14 (Sector-Relative Strength), and the Cross-Sectional Rank factor. The ETF provides the sector benchmark for relative-return computation.

integration.primary_source: Supabase.stocks.sector column (populated from FMP /stable/profile on stock ingestion).
resolution_order: 1. Lookup Supabase stocks.sector for the ticker.
3. Resolve to ETF via sector_etfs map.
4. If resolution fails, log WARNING with ticker + raw sector value, fall back to market_benchmark_etf (SPY).
integration.audit_requirement: Weekly job should count fallback events. If > 2% of universe falls back to SPY, investigate — likely stale or unpopulated Supabase.stocks.sector rows.

notes: Per-ticker ticker→sector mapping is NOT maintained in this file — it lives in Supabase.stocks. This file only maps the sector LABEL to an ETF, which is stable (11 rows) and rarely changes.
GICS added Real Estate as the 11th sector in Sep 2016. If data pre-dates that, Real Estate tickers were classified under Financials.
SPDR ETFs (XL*) are the canonical benchmarks. Alternatives (VGT for tech, VFH for financials) have different sector definitions and should not be substituted without re-running IC analysis.
